title: Venezuelan Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew originating from Venezuela, perfect for a cold evening. This recipe is a variation with added roasted and pistachio notes.

ingredients.name: Venezuelan sofrito
ingredients.notes: available at most Latin American grocery stores

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add sofrito and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add onion and red bell pepper. Cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add sweet potatoes, tomatoes, broth, and pesto. Stir to combine.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped pistachios if desired.
